Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product in the catalog.

description.description: A rich HTML description of the product.

category.description: The category the product belongs to.

imageUrls.description: URLs of the product images. The first one is the main image.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this product belongs to.

Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business using the platform to manage their online presence.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Business entity.

adminEmail.description: The email of the business administrator.

address.description: The physical address of the business.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the business.

websiteUrl.description: The website URL of the business.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile, linking their auth UID to their business.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this user belongs to.

GoogleMyBusinessProfile.title: GoogleMyBusinessProfile
GoogleMyBusinessProfile.description: Represents a Google My Business profile associated with a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GoogleMyBusinessProfile entity.

primaryCategory.description: The primary category of the business on Google My Business.

additionalCategories.description: Additional categories associated with the business.

profileUrl.description: URL of the business's Google My Business profile.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a customer review for a business.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

authorName.description: The name of the review author.

rating.description: The rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

comment.description: The text content of the review.

date.description: The date the review was submitted.

isFiltered.description: Indicates whether the review was filtered internally (e.g., 1-4 stars).

internalFeedbackId.description: Reference to InternalFeedback. (Relationship: InternalFeedback 1:1 Review).  Only populated if review is filtered.

SubscriptionPlan.title: SubscriptionPlan
SubscriptionPlan.description: Represents a subscription plan definition available in the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SubscriptionPlan entity.

name.description: The name of the subscription plan (e.g., Basic, Premium).

price.description: The price of the subscription plan.

currency.description: The currency of the price (e.g., COP, USD).

features.description: A list of features included in the subscription plan.

order.description: The display order of the plan.

isActive.description: Whether the plan is currently available for purchase.

isPopular.description: Whether to highlight this plan as the most popular option.

HotmartPlanMapping.title: HotmartPlanMapping
HotmartPlanMapping.description: Mapping between Hotmart offers and SaaS plans.

HotmartEventLog.title: HotmartEventLog
HotmartEventLog.description: Audit log for Hotmart webhook events.

/products/{productId}.description: Stores all products for all businesses.

/subscriptionPlans/{planId}.description: Defines the available subscription plans managed by Super Admins.

/hotmartPlanMappings/{mappingId}.description: Links Hotmart offers to internal plans.

/hotmartEventLogs/{logId}.description: Logs all incoming webhooks from Hotmart.
